about_public_record.about_summary_narrative:
Josh Miller is a challenger for Place 2 on the Hallsville ISD Board in the May 2026 contested race against Jennifer O'Pry. This is a stub dossier. Josh Miller is a common name and identity disambiguation is required before deep research can proceed. His campaign expenditure report was filed on 4/10/26.

RED FLAG: HISD Police Chief is Chris Miller. A potential family connection must be investigated.

red_flags.description: HISD Police Chief is Chris Miller. Josh Miller is running for a board seat that would give him governance authority over the police department. Check for family tie (father/son, siblings, etc.).

summary: Josh Miller is a challenger for Hallsville ISD Place 2 in the contested May 2026 race (vs. Jennifer O'Pry). Stub dossier. Common name requires identity disambiguation. Campaign expenditure report filed 4/10/26. FLAG: HISD Police Chief Chris Miller, check family tie.
analyst_notes: PRIORITY: Identity disambiguation is the gating task. Josh Miller is one of the most common American names. Before any deep research, must confirm which Josh Miller this is. The Chris Miller (HISD Police Chief) connection is the first thread to pull. Campaign expenditure report (filed 4/10/26) should contain a home address that can be used to confirm identity via Harrison CAD and voter roll. Next moves: (1) pull campaign expenditure PDF for address, (2) cross-reference with Harrison CAD, (3) check voter roll for full legal name and DOB, (4) investigate Chris Miller relationship.
